content.en:
"Jiu'er, in the future, I will help you destroy the Vast Sea Ancestor!"

Ye Tian comforted.

"Thank you, Brother Ye!"

Ouyang Jiu'er only took Ye Tian's words as comfort, after all, how powerful the Vast Sea Ancestor is, he is a real Domain Ancestor, and he is not weak among the Domain Ancestors, now that so many years have passed, who knows if the strength of the Vast Sea Ancestor has improved?

Ye Tian's talent and potential are indeed terrifying, but this talent may still have an effect at the Dao Master level, but what about at the Domain Ancestor level?

I don't know how many amazing genius Dao Ancestors, after breaking through to the Domain Ancestor, it has become very ordinary, and there is no way to improve their strength for endless years, basically just breaking through the realm of the Domain Ancestor is the limit of their life.

Therefore, she didn't expect Ye Tian to really be able to avenge her.

In fact, she also felt that her hope of revenge was very low, and at most she would create some trouble for the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Subsequently, Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er separated.

Ye Tian returned to the human realm and took out the benefits he had obtained from the Heavenly Emperor Palace this time.

The scales of the Darkwing Roc Eagle can be used to create defensive armor, basically one scale can create a pair of armor, and the defense power is still above the top forbidden Arcana level defensive armor.

The weapon above the Forbidden Treasure is called a domain weapon!

And the half-step domain ancestor can create a half-domain weapon, the power of the half-domain weapon is very strong, and of course, there is a lot of power mobilized, but it can save life at a critical time.

Ye Tian didn't have time to build a semi-domain weapon himself, so he entrusted Black Wind Mountain to create a half-domain weapon-level defensive armor for him.

Then, he handed over some of the bones of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle and the many rare ore veins and Sky Killing Spears he had collected to Black Wind Mountain, and asked the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain to transform the Sky Killing Spear for him, striving to raise the Sky Killing Spear to the level of a half-domain weapon.

After doing all this, Ye Tian continued to retreat.

......

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

This time, the fall of the Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord and the Starry Sky Palace Lord really shocked the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Many people couldn't imagine that the two half-step domain ancestors had fallen into the hands of the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, and many of them had dealt with the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, and they admitted that the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors were very powerful.

No matter how powerful it is, it hasn't reached the level of killing two half-step domain ancestors!

Moreover, this time, it was the five half-step domain ancestors who joined forces to intercept and kill the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, and even the Qinglong Palace Master made a move, but he was still not an opponent.

The main hall of the Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master was in a very bad mood, and the other Palace Masters were also very unhappy.

"The Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor has achieved a climate, and it is more difficult to kill him!" the Xuangui Palace Lord said.

"Yes, the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor should be infinitely close to the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and there will be many forbidden Dao techniques, and more importantly, he has only broken through the invincible Dao Ancestor for a short time, and there is still a considerable amount of room for improvement. It is estimated that it will not be long before he will be able to possess the combat power of the true Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor. At that time, it will be too difficult for us to kill him!Unless the Dragon Shadow Palace Master assassinates him, we can easily kill him!"

The main road of the Thunder Tribulation Palace.

"Forget it, let's not target the Ten Thousand Dharma Dao Ancestors! Our ultimate task is to promote the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to the Holy Realm, or even the Forbidden Realm, once the Forbidden Realm is successfully born, then we can attract the Vast Sea Ancestor. When the time comes, all the Dao Ancestors of all things, and the masters of the Wind Mountain, will be ants!"

The main path of the Dragon Shadow Palace.

Many palace masters nodded their heads and agreed with the words of the Dragon Shadow Palace Master.

They admired and respected the Vast Sea Ancestor very much, in front of the Vast Sea Ancestor, even the most powerful Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor was just an ant, what could they resist?

Even if he allowed the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor to grow, would he be able to grow to the Domain Ancestor level?

Difficult!

It's so hard!

Therefore, they don't necessarily have to kill the Ten Thousand Dharma Dao Ancestors right now.

The topic of discussion next for the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord shifted to how to develop and strengthen the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and no longer discussed the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor Ye Tian.

......

The Dao Mountain Realm was very large, and the Xuanxu Ancient Realm only occupied a small area, far from being able to compare with the entire realm.

Therefore, there are too many living beings in the entire Daoshan Realm, and there are also many remote territories.

this day.

Somewhere in the realm of Daoshan, a universe stands here.

Abrupt.

A figure appeared here, staring at this universe and said excitedly: "Hehe, I have found another universe with no background, and after devouring this universe, my strength can be improved a little bit." How many universes is this that I devoured?Oh, when I think about it, it seems to be more than 30,000 universes!"

As soon as he finished speaking, he opened his mouth and inhaled, and the universe turned into a small ball and entered his mouth.

Then, the universe collapsed, turning into a myriad of energies that he devoured.

As for the countless creatures inside the universe, they also fell and died because of this!

This person left this area again, looking for the next universe, and occasionally passed by some chaotic continents, and also directly devoured them.

In short, he only devoured the universe and the Chaos Continent.

He has been doing this for many years.

Of course, he is not stupid, and he will not devour the universe and the Chaos Continent that are more important to those big forces, so it will be easy to be discovered.

But nothing is absolute, no matter how careful he is, there is still a mistake on this day.

Just as he was devouring a Chaos Continent, an illusory figure appeared on a young man's body, which was the mark of an invincible Dao Ancestor.

Obviously, this young man was a registered disciple of the Invincible Dao Ancestor.

"Who is Your Excellency, you dare to devour this Chaos Continent, don't you know that this is a Chaos Continent under the command of our Ten Thousand Domains Temple!"

This invincible Dao Ancestor said coldly.

"Noise!"

The mysterious man snorted coldly, the phantom shattered, and the young man also fell completely and died.

But soon, the mysterious man left the place and disappeared without a trace.

-----------------

Temple of Ten Thousand Domains.

The Half Moon Dao Ancestor was very annoyed, he found a good seedling in the Dao Mountain Realm, his talent was very high, and he was able to cultivate to the True Ancestor level in a short period of time in a barren place like the Chaos Continent, how high his potential was.

He was going to lure the other party to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm soon, as long as he cultivated it well, it would be enough to cultivate the other party to the invincible Dao Ancestor level within 100,000 years, and there was even a glimmer of hope to impact the Supreme True Ancestor level.

However, his named disciple fell, and he was devoured by a mysterious person in the Chaos Continent.

Under normal circumstances, the strong will not devour the weak, except in battle.

can deliberately devour a Chaos Continent, which is tantamount to cutting off the source of genius!

This kind of behavior is basically forbidden by the major forces, and once discovered, it will definitely be severely punished.

"Which force's Dao Ancestor did it?"

The Half Moon Dao Ancestor sent a group of Dao Ancestors to investigate, but the results of the investigation soon surprised people.
